description_long: This is a white Chevrolet SUV with a boxy, utilitarian design, featuring four passenger doors and a rear hatch. The vehicle has a prominent front grille with a gold Chevrolet bowtie emblem, rectangular headlights, and a black bumper. The side profile reveals large, rounded wheel arches, black side mirrors, and a sunroof integrated into the roof. The windows are tinted, and the roof is equipped with black roof rails for additional cargo capacity. The wheels are silver with a five-spoke design, and the rear features large, vertical taillights and a simple, unadorned bumper. The overall appearance suggests a late 1990s to early 2000s Chevrolet SUV, suitable for urban and suburban environments.
description: A white, boxy Chevrolet SUV with four doors, tinted windows, roof rails, and five-spoke silver wheels. It features a prominent front grille, sunroof, and large vertical taillights.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile, four doors, sunroof, black roof rails, and five-spoke wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the grille with Chevrolet emblem, rectangular headlights, and black bumper.
description_view_2: Side view showing the right profile, similar to the left, with clear visibility of the sunroof and wheels.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying large vertical taillights, rear hatch, and simple bumper.
attribute_wheel_design: Five-spoke silver alloy wheels with rounded spokes and a smooth finish
